ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the demographic data is recorded */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* The country code representing the country in the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* The age group for which the demographic data applies */,
  "female_ratio" REAL /* The female ratio for the given demographic */,
  "male_ratio" REAL /* The male ratio for the given demographic */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the demographic */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the demographic data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* The continent on which the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_demographics_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographics_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., pdf, csv, excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link between a report and demographic data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "data_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data used in the report */,
  "data_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_demographics_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographics_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission set */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., country, age group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's permission assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of demographic data */,
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the demographic data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_demographics_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographics_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics_data_sources" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_demographics_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographics_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
